about.title: About me
about.subtitle: AI Automation Specialist & Bilingual Interpreter
about.bio: I'm an AI Automation Specialist & Software Developer focused on designing systems that replace manual operations with intelligent, scalable, and autonomous processes. I build multi-agent AI architectures that analyze, decide and execute tasks in real time, enabling businesses to operate 24/7 with greater efficiency and optimized costs. I also work as an English–Spanish interpreter, allowing me to collaborate seamlessly with international teams and clients.
